title: ProfanityFilterX
body:
ProfanityFilterX is a powerful and customizable chat moderation plugin designed to keep your Minecraft server clean and friendly. With built-in support for filtering offensive or inappropriate language, this plugin ensures a safe environment for all players.

🔧 Features:


```
    Real-time filtering of profane and inappropriate words in chat

    Simple commands to enable, disable, reload, and manage the filter

    Add or remove custom words to the filter list on-the-fly

    Permission system for admins and trusted users to manage or bypass the filter

    Lightweight and optimized for performance on Minecraft 1.20+
```


🛠️ Admin Commands:
Use /profanityfilter (or /pf) to control everything—from enabling the plugin to managing word lists.

🔐 Permissions:

```

    profanityfilter.admin — Full control over the plugin

    profanityfilter.bypass — Exempt from filtering (great for trusted users or staff)
```
CONFIG:
# ProfanityFilter Configuration

# Enable or disable the profanity filter
enabled: true

# Message to send when a message is blocked
blocked-message: "&cYour message was blocked due to inappropriate language."

# Permission to bypass the filter (usually given to moderators/admins)
bypass-permission: "profanityfilter.bypass"

# List of blocked words (case insensitive)
# Add any words you want to block here
blocked-words:
  # English examples
  - "badword1" 
  - "badword2"
  # Spanish examples
  - "palabramala1"
  - "palabramala2"
  # French examples
  - "motgrossier1"
  - "motgrossier2"
  # Add more languages as needed
  Also to prevent people from using bad words like b a d w o r d 1 you may have to type em fully  but ussually it should stop some profanity by their first try.
  
Perfect for community servers, schools, or any server that values a respectful chat experience. Keep your chats clean with ProfanityFilterX!
